# dokploy_traefik_config (Resource)

Manages Dokploy global Traefik configuration via settings APIs.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (String)

### Optional

- `reload_on_apply` (Boolean)
- `server_id` (String)
- `scope` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
